summary: Russell's controversial pole position sets up a fierce battle with Leclerc and the Ferrari challenge, while Mercedes' pace in practice suggests the Silver Arrows have found genuine performance gains at the Red Bull Ring. McLaren's Oscar Piastri lurks as a dangerous third force, and the declared heat-hazard conditions could shake up strategy and expose which teams have solved their thermal management issues. A dominant Mercedes or Ferrari victory would reshape the championship narrative, potentially closing or extending the gap to Verstappen's Red Bull ahead of a critical mid-season stretch.
